aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a basic online presence but lacks significant optimization for AI search. The website includes essential information but needs improvements in content depth, user engagement, and local SEO.
quick_wins: Add customer reviews and testimonials to build trust and improve local SEO.
Optimize meta tags and headers with relevant keywords for better search visibility.
Implement a blog section to provide valuable content related to plumbing, heating, and air services.

gbp_analysis.found: The website includes location-specific information but lacks detailed service area coverage and structured data for Google Business Profile (GBP).
gbp_analysis.summary: The business has a physical location in Westminster, CO, but the website does not fully leverage GBP features such as posts, Q&A, and updated business hours.
critical_issues: No Google reviews, which are crucial for local search visibility.
Incomplete or missing GBP listing information.
Lack of engagement features like Q&A and posts.

nap_citations.summary: The business has consistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone Number) information on its website but lacks citations on major local directories and platforms.
action_items: Create and verify listings on Google My Business, Yelp, and Bing Places.
Ensure NAP consistency across all online directories and social media profiles.
Encourage customers to leave reviews on these platforms.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of customer reviews and testimonials.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for local plumbing and HVAC services in Westminster, CO.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing a review generation strategy and optimizing meta tags.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating high-quality, locally-focused content to establish the business as a trusted local service provider.
